sourceData.name: coinflip-casino-game
sourceData.description: A full-stack, peer-to-peer coinflip betting casino game on Solana. Players connect a wallet, create or join on-chain game rooms, and compete head-to-head for 2× the stake. The UI updates in real time over WebSockets, outcomes are resolved on-chain with Orao VRF, and the backend tracks rooms, chat, and match history in MongoDB.

bodyHtml:
coinflip-casino-game is making waves in the Frontend ecosystem this week, gaining 3new stars. With a total of 349 stars on GitHub and 202 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 349Stars

Key Features

  • Written in TypeScript for maximum performance
  • Licensed under No license — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://www.flip.is/
  • 🏷️ anchor
  • 🏷️ betting

Why coinflip-casino-game Is Trending

The Frontend landscape is constantly evolving, and coinflip-casino-game has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 3 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: A full-stack, peer-to-peer coinflip betting casino game on Solana. Players connect a wallet, create or join on-chain game rooms, and compete head-to-head for 2× the stake. The UI updates in real time over WebSockets, outcomes are resolved on-chain with Orao VRF, and the backend tracks rooms, chat, and match history in MongoDB.

If you're working in Frontend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

How It Compares to Alternatives

When evaluating coinflip-casino-game, it's natural to compare it against established alternatives. Here's what sets it apart:

  • Performance: Built with TypeScript, it leverages modern language features for speed.
  • Community size: 349 stars indicate strong community trust and validation.
  • License: No license licensing means no commercial restrictions.

Quick Start

Get started with coinflip-casino-game in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/xxniiinxx/coinflip-casino-game # Navigate to project cd coinflip-casino-game # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

coinflip-casino-game is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
